XenotypeDef.label: Marked One
XenotypeDef.description: The Marked Virus has fully consumed its host, forging an aggressive and resilient predator that lives only to hunt and kill.

XenotypeDef.label: Marked One - spitter
XenotypeDef.description: The Marked Virus has twisted this host into a living acid battery, its glands producing corrosive compounds that melt flesh and spread the infection.
